title: Theological Document Collection
description: Standardized schema for historical confessions, creeds, and catechisms.

id.description: Unique identifier for the document, e.g., 'wcf', 'lbcf'.

title.description: The title of the document, e.g., 'Westminster Confession of Faith'.

year.description: The year the document was published or drafted.

content.description: The modernized or standard translated text of the document.

content_original.description: The text in its original language, if applicable.

proofs.description: List of scriptural proofs cited in the document.

display.description: How the verse reference was displayed in the original text.

connections.description: Array of connected document IDs forming cross-references.

history_link.description: ID of the older document this derived from, establishing the lineage.
